basic_details.job_title: TMC – Specialist Senior Resident / Senior Resident / Medical Officer – 1 Posts
basic_details.post_name: Specialist Senior Resident / Senior Resident / Medical Officer
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Specialist Senior Resident / Senior Resident / Medical Officer. Candidates with M. Ch / Dr. NB , M.S./D.N.B, M.B.B.S Can attend walkin. For detailed information please visit TMC official website.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 45 years (Relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC & 10 years for Physically Handicapped)

qualification.education_qualification: M. Ch / Dr. NB (Pediatric Surgery) OR M.S./D.N.B. General Surgery OR M.B.B.S. Degree, recognized by NMC.

salary_details.pay_scale: Specialist Senior Resident: ₹ 1,45,530/-, Senior Resident: ₹ 1,33,623/-, Medical Officer: ₹ 1,11,132/-

seo_tags: TMC Specialist Senior Resident / Senior Resident / Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
